evals.prompt: Can you go to https://httpbin.org/forms/post and fill in the customer name field with 'Wayne', set the email to 'wayne@test.com', then submit the form?
evals.expected_output: Opens the browser with playwright-cli open, takes a snapshot to see the form elements with refs, fills in the fields using playwright-cli fill with the correct refs, then clicks the submit button.

evals.prompt: take a screenshot of example.com and save it as example-homepage.png
evals.expected_output: Uses playwright-cli open to navigate to example.com, then playwright-cli screenshot --filename=example-homepage.png to capture and save it.

evals.prompt: I need to check the Playwright docs site — can you go to playwright.dev, search for 'page.click', and tell me what comes up?
evals.expected_output: Opens playwright.dev with playwright-cli open, takes a snapshot to find the search element, types the query, presses Enter or clicks search, takes another snapshot, and reports back what appears in the results.
